summary.weather: Seoul (Sunday, March 29, 2026: Generally cloudy, 10°C to 21°C, light breezes, comfortable spring weather.)
summary.market: Market Overview (Mar 29): Q1 2026 volatility persists. AMZN (Mar 27) closed at $199.34 (-4.02%) on AI spending headwinds. INTC showing caution despite earlier rally on Core Ultra Series 3 launch. Defensive sectors remains key.
